zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III於1348年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun16歲，母親Margaret Montgomery14歲。他和Mrs. John de Sempill至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1400年在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III于1348年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun16岁，母亲Margaret Montgomery14岁。他和Mrs. John de Sempill至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1400年在英国苏格兰雷福福爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sempill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Semple
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): nickname from Middle English, Older Scots, and Old French simple ‘simple, straightforward, humble’ (from Latin simplus). The Scottish name was taken to Ulster in the 17th century, and a Scottish family of this name held the hereditary post of Sheriff of Renfrewshire from the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III was born in 1348, in Scotland, his father, Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun, was 16 and his mother, Margaret Montgomery, was 14. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Mrs. John de Sempill. He died in 1400, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III est né en 1348, à Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Margaret Montgomery, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs. John de Sempill. Il est décédé en 1400, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III 1348 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun 16 und seine Mutter Margaret Montgomery 14. Er hatte mit Mrs. John de Sempill mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III è nato il nel 1348 nel Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Montgomery, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Mrs. John de Sempill. Morì nel 1400, nel Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun IIIが1348年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstounは16歳，母Margaret Montgomeryは14歳であった。彼はMrs. John de Sempillとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1400年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III(이)가 1348년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Montgomery(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Mrs. John de Sempill(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III nasceu em 1348, em Scotland, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Montgomery, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Mrs. John de Sempill. Ele faleceu em 1400, em Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III родился в 1348 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Montgomery, 14. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Mrs. John de Sempill. Он умер в 1400 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III nació en 1348, en Scotland, su papá, Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Margaret Montgomery, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Mrs. John de Sempill. Murió en 1400, en Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
